headerTitle: Senior Software Engineer  ·  MNTN  ·  Streaming Ad Tech
intro: MNTN's performance TV platform sits at the intersection of two things I've built against for years: real-time data pipelines and audience-driven product loops. I've shipped full-stack systems at scale where the feedback cycle between an event and a UI update has to be near-instant.
bullets: Ad Platform Context — Built revenue dashboards and analytics pipelines at Max EV Digital where event volume, attribution windows, and spend optimization logic mirror the core engineering problems in performance TV advertising.

Full-Stack at Scale — Delivered Next.js + Node.js products from solo prototype to multi-tenant SaaS handling concurrent sessions, real-time state, and complex role-based access — shipped to production, not just staged.
Instrumentation-First — GA4 event pipelines, custom dashboards, and A/B-ready feature flags are part of how I build by default — the kind of telemetry culture performance advertising runs on.
closingLine: Available immediately. Austin, TX (open to hybrid or remote).
matchNotes: Strong full-stack and data pipeline alignment; ad tech is adjacent not direct — solid fit
